---
title: "Public Health Calendar"
description: "Important public health awareness months, health observances, and key dates. Stay informed about global and national health initiatives."
---

# Public Health Calendar

Stay informed about important health observances, awareness campaigns, and public health events throughout the year. This calendar highlights key dates when communities focus on specific health issues and prevention strategies.

::: {style="overflow-x: auto; margin: 2rem 0;"}

## 2024-2025 Public Health Calendar

:::

```{=html}
<style>
.calendar-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}

.calendar-month {
  background: white;
  border: 2px solid #0d5c63;
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(13, 92, 99, 0.12);
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}

.calendar-month:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(13, 92, 99, 0.18);
}

.calendar-header {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d5c63 0%, #124559 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.calendar-events {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.calendar-event {
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  padding: 0.8rem;
  background: #f7fbfc;
  border-left: 4px solid #0d5c63;
  border-radius: 0.4rem;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.calendar-event:hover {
  background: #e6f3f4;
  border-left-color: #124559;
}

.event-date {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #0d5c63;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.event-title {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #124559;
  margin: 0.4rem 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.event-description {
  color: #5b6f76;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin: 0.4rem 0;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div class="calendar-grid">
<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">January</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">January 12</span>
<div class="event-title">National Youth Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Focus on youth health and wellness, mental health awareness for young people, and substance abuse prevention programs</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">January 24</span>
<div class="event-title">National Girl Child Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Girl child education and health, awareness about gender equality, nutrition programs, and health screening camps</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">January 30</span>
<div class="event-title">World Leprosy Eradication Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Elimination awareness, reducing stigma and discrimination, early diagnosis and treatment promotion, community screening camps</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">February</div>
<div class="calendar-events">

<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 4</span>
<div class="event-title">World Cancer Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Cancer prevention and early detection focus, health camps, awareness seminars, and educational material distribution</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 6</span>
<div class="event-title">FGM Zero Tolerance Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Eliminating harmful practices and women's health advocacy</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 9</span>
<div class="event-title">International Epilepsy Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Epilepsy awareness and management through campaigns and counseling</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 10</span>
<div class="event-title">National Deworming Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Parasitic disease prevention targeting school children and vulnerable populations</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 11</span>
<div class="event-title">Women in Science Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Recognize female scientists and healthcare professionals in STEM and health fields</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 20</span>
<div class="event-title">Social Justice Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Health equity and inclusive healthcare through community initiatives</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Feb 28</span>
<div class="event-title">National Science Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Promote scientific awareness in health through science-based communication</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">March</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 3</span>
<div class="event-title">World Hearing Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Ear and hearing health through screening camps and noise pollution awareness</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 8</span>
<div class="event-title">International Women's Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Women's health, maternal and reproductive health, cancer screening awareness, and wellness programs</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 12</span>
<div class="event-title">World Kidney Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Kidney disease prevention through screening and health education</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 16</span>
<div class="event-title">National Vaccination Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Immunization awareness and coverage through vaccination camps</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 20</span>
<div class="event-title">World Oral Health Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Dental health and hygiene through screening and care education</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 21</span>
<div class="event-title">Down Syndrome Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Awareness and inclusivity with community support for families</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 22</span>
<div class="event-title">World Water Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Water safety and sanitation for health, clean water access and disease prevention</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 24</span>
<div class="event-title">World Tuberculosis Day</div>
<div class="event-description">TB elimination through community screening, patient education, and public awareness campaigns</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 25</span>
<div class="event-title">International Day for Unborn Child</div>
<div class="event-description">Prenatal health, fetal development, maternal nutrition and care</div>
</div>
<div class="calendar-event">
<span class="event-date">Mar 26</span>
<div class="event-title">Epilepsy Awareness Day</div>
<div class="event-description">Reduce stigma and promote treatment and management awareness</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">April</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Apr 1</span><div class="event-title">Prevention of Blindness Week</div><div class="event-description">Eye screening camps and health awareness</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Apr 2</span><div class="event-title">World Autism Awareness Day</div><div class="event-description">Community programs and support services</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Apr 7</span><div class="event-title">World Health Day</div><div class="event-description">Global health awareness campaigns</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Apr 11</span><div class="event-title">Safe Motherhood Day</div><div class="event-description">Maternal health and antenatal care</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Apr 25</span><div class="event-title">World Malaria Day</div><div class="event-description">Malaria prevention and treatment</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">May</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">May 5</span><div class="event-title">World Asthma Day</div><div class="event-description">Asthma management and screening</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">May 12</span><div class="event-title">International Nurses Day</div><div class="event-description">Recognition of nursing professionals</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">May 17</span><div class="event-title">Hypertension Day</div><div class="event-description">Blood pressure screening and management</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">May 28</span><div class="event-title">Menstrual Hygiene Day</div><div class="event-description">Period health and hygiene awareness</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">May 31</span><div class="event-title">World No Tobacco Day</div><div class="event-description">Tobacco cessation workshops</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">June</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jun 5</span><div class="event-title">World Environment Day</div><div class="event-description">Environmental health and sustainability</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jun 14</span><div class="event-title">World Blood Donor Day</div><div class="event-description">Blood donation camps and safety</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jun 21</span><div class="event-title">International Yoga Day</div><div class="event-description">Physical fitness and wellness programs</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jun 26</span><div class="event-title">Day Against Drug Abuse</div><div class="event-description">Substance abuse prevention awareness</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">July</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jul 1</span><div class="event-title">Doctor's Day</div><div class="event-description">Medical professionals appreciation</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jul 11</span><div class="event-title">World Population Day</div><div class="event-description">Family planning and reproductive health</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Jul 28</span><div class="event-title">World Hepatitis Day</div><div class="event-description">Viral hepatitis prevention and vaccination</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">August</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Aug 1</span><div class="event-title">World Breastfeeding Week</div><div class="event-description">Lactation support and maternal education</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Aug 13</span><div class="event-title">Organ Donation Day</div><div class="event-description">Organ donation awareness campaigns</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Aug 20</span><div class="event-title">Mosquito Day</div><div class="event-description">Vector-borne disease prevention</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">September</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Sep 1</span><div class="event-title">Nutrition Week</div><div class="event-description">Healthy nutrition and diet counseling</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Sep 8</span><div class="event-title">Physiotherapy Day</div><div class="event-description">Rehabilitation and physical health</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Sep 10</span><div class="event-title">World Suicide Prevention Day</div><div class="event-description">Mental health awareness and support</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Sep 29</span><div class="event-title">World Heart Day</div><div class="event-description">Cardiovascular health screening</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">October</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Oct 1</span><div class="event-title">Day of Older Persons</div><div class="event-description">Elderly health care programs</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Oct 8</span><div class="event-title">World Sight Day</div><div class="event-description">Eye health and vision screening</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Oct 10</span><div class="event-title">World Mental Health Day</div><div class="event-description">Mental health awareness and counseling</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Oct 24</span><div class="event-title">World Polio Day</div><div class="event-description">Polio eradication vaccination</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Oct 29</span><div class="event-title">World Stroke Day</div><div class="event-description">Stroke prevention awareness</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">November</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Nov 12</span><div class="event-title">World Pneumonia Day</div><div class="event-description">Respiratory health and vaccination</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Nov 14</span><div class="event-title">World Diabetes Day</div><div class="event-description">Diabetes screening and education</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Nov 16</span><div class="event-title">World COPD Day</div><div class="event-description">Respiratory health programs</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Nov 19</span><div class="event-title">World Toilet Day</div><div class="event-description">Sanitation and hygiene awareness</div></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="calendar-month">
<div class="calendar-header">December</div>
<div class="calendar-events">
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Dec 1</span><div class="event-title">World AIDS Day</div><div class="event-description">HIV awareness and testing camps</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Dec 3</span><div class="event-title">Day of Persons with Disabilities</div><div class="event-description">Disability-inclusive health services</div></div>
<div class="calendar-event"><span class="event-date">Dec 12</span><div class="event-title">Universal Health Coverage Day</div><div class="event-description">Accessible and affordable healthcare</div></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
```

## How to Use This Calendar

### For Patients & Community
- Mark important health observance dates
- Participate in screening and awareness camps
- Seek preventive care during awareness months

### For Healthcare Providers
- Plan screening camps around key dates
- Develop educational materials
- Conduct awareness sessions

### For EpiPulse Team
- Schedule volunteer activities around key dates
- Organize community events
- Plan awareness campaigns

---

## Contact & Participation

Interested in participating in EpiPulse health initiatives?

- **Email**: programs@epipulse.org
- **Join Our Team**: [Volunteer](volunteer.qmd)

**Stay healthy, stay informed!**
